title: Denise's Sweet Potato Casserole
description: A classic holiday sweet potato casserole — mashed sweet potatoes with brown sugar and vanilla under a crumbly pecan streusel, with optional toasted marshmallows.
instructions: Butter a 2-quart casserole dish. Set aside.
Peel and dice the sweet potatoes. Cook in a pot with water until soft.
Once the potatoes are cooked, drain and mash. Add butter, brown sugar, vanilla, salt, and eggs. Mix well (a whisk helps). Spread the potato mixture in the prepared casserole dish. Set aside.
In another mixing bowl, mix together the sugar, flour, salt, and nuts. Add the melted butter and stir with a fork until it forms a crumbly dough.
Sprinkle the topping over the mashed potatoes.
Bake casserole for 25 minutes. If desired, add mini marshmallows, place the dish back in the oven, and bake until the marshmallows are toasted, about 3 to 5 minutes.
